plugin.name: aardwolf_vorpal_tracker
plugin.author: Gaindal and Nalani with lots of AI help

muclient.script:
-- ========================================= -- VERSION -- =========================================
VORPAL_VERSION = "2.0"
-- ========================================= -- GLOBAL STATE -- =========================================
VORPAL_CHANNEL = GetVariable("vorpal_channel") if not VORPAL_CHANNEL or VORPAL_CHANNEL == "" then VORPAL_CHANNEL = "spo" end
VORPAL_MUTED = (GetVariable("vorpal_muted") == "true")
VORPAL_MESSAGE_MODE = GetVariable("vorpal_message_mode") or "default" VORPAL_MESSAGE_CUSTOM = GetVariable("vorpal_message_custom") or ""
lifetime_vorpals = tonumber(GetVariable("lifetime_vorpals")) or 0 today_vorpals = tonumber(GetVariable("today_vorpals")) or 0 session_vorpals = 0
-- Daily reset local saved_date = GetVariable("vorpal_date") if not saved_date or saved_date ~= os.date("%Y%m%d") then today_vorpals = 0 SetVariable("today_vorpals", 0) SetVariable("vorpal_date", os.date("%Y%m%d")) end
-- ========================================= -- PERSISTENCE -- =========================================
function save_vorpal_totals() SetVariable("lifetime_vorpals", lifetime_vorpals) SetVariable("today_vorpals", today_vorpals) end
-- ========================================= -- MESSAGE BUILDER -- =========================================
function build_vorpal_message()
if VORPAL_MESSAGE_MODE == "brief" then return "got another vorpal (@x214" .. today_vorpals .. "@x208 today / @x207" .. lifetime_vorpals .. "@x208 total)." end
if VORPAL_MESSAGE_MODE == "custom" and VORPAL_MESSAGE_CUSTOM ~= "" then local msg = VORPAL_MESSAGE_CUSTOM
msg = msg:gsub("{session}", "@x226" .. session_vorpals .. "@x208") msg = msg:gsub("{today}", "@x214" .. today_vorpals .. "@x208") msg = msg:gsub("{lifetime}", "@x207" .. lifetime_vorpals .. "@x208")
return msg end
-- Default duffle bag message local head_word = (session_vorpals == 1) and "head" or "heads"
return "has just claimed another head! This brings their total for this session to @x226" .. session_vorpals .. " " .. head_word .. "@x208 and the total number of heads in their duffle bag to @x207" .. lifetime_vorpals .. "@x208." end
-- ========================================= -- OUTPUT -- =========================================
function send_vorpal_message(msg) if VORPAL_MUTED then return end ColourNote("@x208", "", msg) Send(VORPAL_CHANNEL .. " :@x208" .. msg .. "@w") end
-- ========================================= -- CORE TRACKING -- =========================================
function add_vorpal() session_vorpals = session_vorpals + 1 today_vorpals = today_vorpals + 1 lifetime_vorpals = lifetime_vorpals + 1
save_vorpal_totals()
local msg = build_vorpal_message() send_vorpal_message(msg) end
-- ========================================= -- REPORTING -- =========================================
function report_vorpals()
local report = "=== Vorpal Statistics === " .. "(Session) @x226" .. session_vorpals .. "@x208 | " .. "(Today) @x214" .. today_vorpals .. "@x208 | " .. "(Lifetime) @x207" .. lifetime_vorpals
ColourNote("@x208","", report)
if not VORPAL_MUTED then Send(VORPAL_CHANNEL .. " :" .. report .. "@w") end end
function test_vorpal_message()
local preview = build_vorpal_message()
ColourNote("@x226","", "=== Vorpal Message Preview ===") ColourNote("@x208","", preview)
if not VORPAL_MUTED then Send(VORPAL_CHANNEL .. " :@x208" .. preview .. "@w") end
end
-- ========================================= -- RESET -- =========================================
function reset_vorpals(confirm) if confirm ~= "confirm" then ColourNote("@x196","", "Type: vorpalreset confirm (to reset statistics)") return end
session_vorpals = 0 today_vorpals = 0 lifetime_vorpals = 0
save_vorpal_totals()
ColourNote("@x208","@x196","All vorpal statistics reset.") end
-- ========================================= -- CHANNEL CONTROL -- =========================================
function set_vorpal_channel(arg) if not arg or arg == "" then local status = VORPAL_MUTED and "Muted" or "Active" ColourNote("@x208","", "Vorpal tracker channel: " .. VORPAL_CHANNEL .. " | Status: " .. status) return end
arg = string.lower(arg)
if arg == "mute" then VORPAL_MUTED = true SetVariable("vorpal_muted","true") ColourNote("@x226","@x196","Vorpal tracker muted.") return end
if arg == "unmute" then VORPAL_MUTED = false SetVariable("vorpal_muted","false") ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Vorpal tracker unmuted.") return end
VORPAL_CHANNEL = arg SetVariable("vorpal_channel", VORPAL_CHANNEL) ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Vorpal tracker channel set to: " .. VORPAL_CHANNEL) end
-- ========================================= -- MESSAGE CONFIGURATION -- =========================================
function set_vorpal_message(arg)
if not arg or arg == "" then ColourNote("@x226","", "Current vorpal message mode: @x214" .. VORPAL_MESSAGE_MODE)
local preview = build_vorpal_message() ColourNote("@x208","", "Preview:") ColourNote("@x208","", preview) return end
if arg == "default" then VORPAL_MESSAGE_MODE = "default" SetVariable("vorpal_message_mode", "default") ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Vorpal message set to default.") return end
if arg == "brief" then VORPAL_MESSAGE_MODE = "brief" SetVariable("vorpal_message_mode", "brief") ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Vorpal message set to brief.") return end
if arg == "new" then ColourNote("@x226","", "Usage:") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalmessage new TEXT") ColourNote("@x208","", "Placeholders: {session} {today} {lifetime}") ColourNote("@x208","", "Example:") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalmessage new just scored another! ({today} today / {lifetime} total)") return end
if arg:sub(1,4) == "new " then local custom = arg:sub(5)
VORPAL_MESSAGE_MODE = "custom" VORPAL_MESSAGE_CUSTOM = custom
SetVariable("vorpal_message_mode", "custom") SetVariable("vorpal_message_custom", custom)
ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Custom vorpal message set.") return end
ColourNote("@x196","", "Invalid option. Type 'vorpalmessage' for help.") end -- ========================================= -- HIDDEN MANUAL SETTERS -- =========================================
function set_session_vorpals(val) session_vorpals = tonumber(val) or session_vorpals ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Session vorpals manually set to: " .. session_vorpals) end
function set_today_vorpals(val) today_vorpals = tonumber(val) or today_vorpals SetVariable("today_vorpals", today_vorpals) ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Daily vorpals manually set to: " .. today_vorpals) end
function set_lifetime_vorpals(val) lifetime_vorpals = tonumber(val) or lifetime_vorpals SetVariable("lifetime_vorpals", lifetime_vorpals) ColourNote("@x226","@x214","Lifetime vorpals manually set to: " .. lifetime_vorpals) end
function show_vorpal_help()
ColourNote("@x226","", "=== Vorpal Tracker v" .. VORPAL_VERSION .. " ===")
ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalstats - show current statistics") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalreset - reset statistics (confirmation required)") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalreset confirm - confirm reset")
ColourNote("@x208","", "") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalchan - show channel and mute status") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalchan CHANNEL - change report channel") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalchan mute - mute reporting") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalchan unmute - unmute reporting")
ColourNote("@x208","", "") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalmessage - show current mode + preview") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalmessage default - duffle bag message") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalmessage brief - clean short message") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalmessage new - custom message help") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpalmessage new TEXT - set custom message") ColourNote("@x208","", "vorpaltest - preview current message")
ColourNote("@x208","", "") ColourNote("@x214","", "Hidden setters:") ColourNote("@x208","", "setsessionvorpals #") ColourNote("@x208","", "settodayvorpals #") ColourNote("@x208","", "setlifetimevorpals #")
ColourNote("@x208","", "") ColourNote("@x244","", "Made with excessive elegance by Gaindal.")
end
-- ========================================= -- STARTUP MESSAGE -- =========================================
ColourNote("@x226","", "Aardwolf Vorpal Tracker – Elegant Edition v" .. VORPAL_VERSION .. " loaded.")

trigger.match: Deep magic stirs within your weapon. It seems to have a life of its own.
